title: Survival Instinct
description: The best addition to your apocalyptic modpack
body:
Features
![Survival Instinct](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b751f02626f7b81317ce0a2b72cc8e37fcce2a32.png)
Survival Instinct is a mod set in an apocalyptic era where after the fall in the value of money, society succumbed to chaos, it ceased to have any value and began to have vandalism and destruction.
Within the world you will find new structures devastated over time, new minerals in the depths such as Steellium and Sulfur that will help you progress in your adventure.
And not only that, but it will also bring military equipment that will help you in your survival, with a lot of new weapons to use.
Equipment![Armors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca1773a9944017dc91accf541eacefe2b5e4229e_0.webp)
![Structures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0280eba85ae62a03a9ba56bbfa5c096125175d7_0.webp)
![Weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c1c983760deff02d94ff9983d00f4400b32e792_0.webp)
